title: Social networks at cava & twitts
body: [Cava&Twitts](http://www.cavaandtwitts.com/) are monthly talks held in Barcelona on topics related to [Twitter](http://www.xarop.com/category/web-20/twitter-web-20/) , participatory talks followed by networking time while having one or several glasses of cava. So far there have been 2 editions, the first on Twitter and journalism and another on Twitter and tourism. Yesterday it was the turn of Social networks, I had planned to attend but in the end I couldn't go .... lucky that I can follow it a bit through [my Twitter](http://twitter.com/xarop) and today through the blogs of attendees like this very interesting one by [@daniel\_julia](http://twitter.com/daniel_julia) [Social networks at cava & twitts](http://www.kiwoo.org/blog/index.php/archives/2008/12/18/redes-sociales-en-el-cava-twitts/)
